Class MagicWebSocketClientProfile.Builder<C>

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http.MagicWebSocketClientProfile.Builder<C>
Type Parameters:
C - config type
Enclosing class:
MagicWebSocketClientProfile<C>
public static final class MagicWebSocketClientProfile.Builder<C> extends Object
Builder for MagicWebSocketClientProfile.

    Applies a builder customization that can read the config instance.

    Applies a builder customization that does not depend on config.

    Overrides connect timeout from config.

    Sets the config sections that should trigger client rebuilds.
